s1.title: Khiva Code
s1.description: is modern clothing based on the architecture of Khiva. Its culture, geometry and system of proportions have been formed over centuries, creating a unique visual and semantic code.

s3.title: We don't create things for trends
s3.description: we build a system based on the principles of form, precision and time. Khiva Code is founded on architectural thinking inherited from Khiva, where every line follows logic and every detail has meaning.

s4.quote: Minimalism built by the laws of the city

s5.title: Every Model
s5.description: is part of a unified language, where form, proportions and structure work as a holistic code. From fabric selection to the last stitch, from silhouette to the tactile and visual experience of packaging — everything is built as a continuation of one idea.

s6.address: Uzbekistan, Khorezm region, Shavat district, Sahibkor street 40.
